name: @forgeax/hello-hdrp-lighting
description: HDRP cluster-forward 256-light demo (feat-20260608-cluster-lighting M7 / w25). Spawns ~256 punctual lights and installs forgeax::hdrp via assets.register<RenderPipelineAsset> + renderer.installPipeline. URP is the engine default; this demo opts in to HDRP. AC-06 / AC-21.

forgeax._comment: smokeInvocation = self-contained SSOT (mirrors hello-bloom): the HDRP install seam + 256-light spawn must survive the dawn-node 300-frame loop with 0 RhiError + 4 HDRP buffers wired on BGL slots 3..6.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle (dist/assets) shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime + @forgeax/engine-rhi-webgpu sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: fps no-regression covered by hello-cube / hello-room / hello-app gates that run the URP zero-overhead default; HDRP cluster-forward cost is verified via the smoke gate (structural-only) rather than per-app fps sampling

bench.reason: cluster-forward perf bench scope deferred (OOS-1: bench focus stays on @forgeax/parity-urp-vs-hdrp pixel-parity ≤4 lights subset)

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; this is the M7 hello-hdrp-lighting opt-in exemplar
